tasks.title: Analyze Current README and Documentation for Improvement Areas
tasks.description: Review the existing README.md and any project documentation files to identify outdated, incomplete, or unclear sections related to project features, code structure, and AI coding agent usage. Document specific areas needing updates or additions.
acceptanceCriteria: A list of sections and points in README.md and docs identified for update or improvement
Clear notes on missing or unclear information about features, code, and AI coding agent
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed analysis report listing all areas in README and documentation that require updates or enhancements to meet software industry standards.

outputPlan.description: Analysis report of current README and documentation improvement areas

metadata.inputContext: Current README.md and project documentation files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear scope and focus for the documentation update tasks.

tasks.title: Outline Updated README Structure Including Features, Code, and AI Coding Agent
tasks.description: Create a detailed outline for the updated README.md that includes sections on project overview, features, code architecture, AI coding agent capabilities, installation, usage, and contribution guidelines. Ensure the outline aligns with software industry best practices for open source project documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: A comprehensive README outline covering all key aspects of the project
Outline includes clear headings and subheadings for features, codebase, and AI coding agent
tasks.expectedResult: A structured README outline document ready for content writing and integration.

outputPlan.description: Structured outline for the updated README.md

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear blueprint for writing the updated README content.

tasks.title: Draft Updated README Content with Industry Standard Sections
tasks.description: Write the updated README.md content based on the approved outline. Include detailed descriptions of project features, codebase structure, and AI coding agent functionality. Use clear, concise language and industry-standard formatting (e.g., badges, code blocks, links).
acceptanceCriteria: README.md draft includes all outlined sections with accurate and clear content
Content reflects current project state and AI coding agent capabilities
README uses markdown best practices for readability
tasks.expectedResult: A complete draft of README.md updated to industry standards and project specifics.

outputPlan.description: Updated README.md with new content on features, code, and AI coding agent

metadata.inputContext: README outline document and project source code for reference
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the main project entry point documentation reflecting current features and AI agent.

tasks.title: Update Additional Project Documentation to Reflect Features and AI Coding Agent
tasks.description: Modify or create supplementary documentation files (e.g., docs/FEATURES.md, docs/AI_AGENT.md) to provide detailed technical descriptions of project features, code architecture, and AI coding agent usage. Ensure consistency with README and industry documentation standards.
acceptanceCriteria: Supplementary docs updated or created with clear, detailed content
Documentation aligns with README and project codebase
Files use markdown formatting and are placed in appropriate docs/ directory
tasks.expectedResult: Additional documentation files updated or created to complement README and provide in-depth project information.

outputPlan.description: Detailed features documentation aligned with README
Documentation describing AI coding agent capabilities and usage

metadata.inputContext: Updated README.md and project source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances project documentation completeness and clarity on features and AI agent.

tasks.title: Review and Validate Updated README and Documentation
tasks.description: Perform a thorough review of the updated README.md and supplementary documentation files to ensure clarity, accuracy, completeness, and adherence to software industry standards. Validate markdown formatting and check for consistency across documents.
acceptanceCriteria: No markdown syntax errors in README.md and docs
Content is consistent and accurate across all documentation
Documentation meets industry standards for open source projects
tasks.expectedResult: Documentation passes markdown linting and manual review confirms quality and consistency.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the updated documentation is high quality and ready for project use.
